University of Otago Clinical Psychology Centre | psychologist | Otago / Dunedin
Broad tag "trauma" is present but source fields do not clearly support it.

currentProvider.name: University of Otago Clinical Psychology Centre
currentProvider.address: William James Building, 275 Leith Walk, North Dunedin, Dunedin 9016
currentProvider.hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm; appointments are usually weekly and arranged after referral screening.
currentProvider.cost: No charge for services at the Centre.
currentProvider.fit: No-charge training clinic supervised by registered clinical psychologists. Referrals can cover adults, children, anxiety disorders, OCD, depression, health behaviour problems, sleep issues, relationship difficulties, social skills, and some neuropsychological concerns. It does not accept self-referrals and declines some high-risk or severe presentations.
currentProvider.firstStep: Ask your GP, health professional, teacher, or support worker to refer you. You can email or call the Centre administrator first if you are unsure whether the referral is suitable.
